code: @Manual{,   title = {ggrounded: Rounded Bar Plots},   author = {Botan Ağın},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.1.0.9000},   url = {https://github.com/botan/ggrounded}, }

title: Rounded Bar Plots
text: ggrounded creates bar plots rounded corners using ggplot2.

title: Rounded Bar Plots
text: Install released version ggrounded CRAN: install development version GitHub :

title: Rounded Bar Plots
text: two types bar charts ggplot2: geom_bar() geom_col(). geom_bar_rounded() geom_col_rounded() wrappers rounding top corners. geom_bar_rounded() makes height bar proportional number cases group (weight aesthetic supplied, sum weights). radius argument normalized value 0 1. Use 0 square corners 1 maximum rounding bar can safely support based width height.  want heights bars represent values data, use geom_col_rounded() instead.  Use larger radius values want pronounced rounded top:  Histograms can use rounded bins geom_histogram_rounded():  Negative values supported . Bars zero keep rounded top corners, bars zero round away baseline:  Horizontal bars supported well. horizontal layouts, rounding follows terminal bar edge rather baseline:
code: library(ggrounded) library(ggplot2)  ggplot(mpg, aes(class)) +   geom_bar_rounded() ggplot(data.frame(x = letters[1:3], y = c(2.3, 1.9, 3.2)), aes(x, y)) +   geom_col_rounded() ggplot(data.frame(x = letters[1:3], y = c(2.3, 1.9, 3.2)), aes(x, y)) +   geom_col_rounded(radius = 1) ggplot(faithful, aes(waiting)) +   geom_histogram_rounded(bins = 10) ggplot(data.frame(x = letters[1:4], y = c(2.3, -1.9, 3.2, -2.6)), aes(x, y)) +   geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +   geom_col_rounded() ggplot(   data.frame(category = letters[1:4], value = c(2.3, -1.9, 3.2, -2.6)),   aes(value, category) ) +   geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dotted") +   geom_col_rounded()

title: Rounded Bar Plots
text: Please note ggrounded released contributor code conduct. contributing project agree abide terms.

what: Bar plot with rounded corners — geom_bar_rounded
title: Bar plot with rounded corners — geom_bar_rounded
text: Create bar plot rounded corners using 'ggplot2'. geom_col_rounded() geom_bar_rounded() extensions ggplot2::geom_col() ggplot2::geom_bar() functions provide additional aesthetics visually appealing outputs.

title: Bar plot with rounded corners — geom_bar_rounded
code: geom_bar_rounded(   mapping = NULL,   data = NULL,   position = ggplot2::position_stack(reverse = TRUE),   radius = 0.2,   ...,   width = NULL,   na.rm = FALSE,   show.legend = NA,   inherit.aes = TRUE )  geom_col_rounded(   mapping = NULL,   data = NULL,   position = ggplot2::position_stack(reverse = TRUE),   radius = 0.2,   ...,   width = NULL,   na.rm = FALSE,   show.legend = NA,   inherit.aes = TRUE )

title: Bar plot with rounded corners — geom_bar_rounded
text: mapping Set aesthetic mappings created ggplot2::aes(). specified inherit.aes = TRUE (default), combined default mapping top level plot. must supply mapping plot mapping. data data displayed layer. three options: NULL, default, data inherited plot data specified call ggplot2::ggplot(). data.frame, object, override plot data. objects fortified produce data frame. See ggplot2::fortify() variables created. function called single argument, plot data. return value must data.frame, used layer data. function can created formula (e.g. ~ head(.x, 10)). position Position adjustment, either string naming adjustment (e.g. "jitter" use position_jitter), result call position adjustment function. Use latter need change settings adjustment. radius normalized rounding amount 0 1. Use 0 square corners 1 maximum rounding bar can safely support. ... arguments passed ggplot2::layer(). often aesthetics, used set aesthetic fixed value, like colour = "red" size = 3. may also parameters paired geom/stat. width Bar width. supplied, default use width 90% resolution data. na.rm FALSE, default, missing values removed warning. TRUE, missing values silently removed. show.legend logical. layer included legends? NA, default, includes aesthetics mapped. FALSE never includes, TRUE always includes. can also named logical vector finely select aesthetics display. inherit.aes FALSE, overrides default aesthetics, rather combining . useful helper functions define data aesthetics inherit behaviour default plot specification, e.g. ggplot2::borders().

title: Bar plot with rounded corners — geom_bar_rounded
Bar plot with rounded corners — geom_bar_rounded
text: code function adapted solution provided Stack Overflow user 'sthoch' following post: https://stackoverflow.com/questions/62176038/r-ggplot2-bar-chart--round-corners--top--bar

title: Bar plot with rounded corners — geom_bar_rounded
code: library(ggplot2)  ggplot(data.frame(x = letters[1:3], y = c(2.3, 1.9, 3.2)), aes(x, y)) +   geom_col_rounded()   ggplot(data.frame(x = letters[1:3], y = c(2.3, 1.9, 3.2)), aes(x, y)) +   geom_col_rounded(radius = 1)   ggplot(mpg, aes(class)) +   geom_bar_rounded()

title: Histogram with rounded bars — geom_histogram_rounded
text: Create histogram rounded corners using 'ggplot2'. geom_histogram_rounded() extension ggplot2::geom_histogram() function uses binning parameters ggplot2::stat_bin() drawing bars rounded corners.

title: Histogram with rounded bars — geom_histogram_rounded
code: geom_histogram_rounded(   mapping = NULL,   data = NULL,   position = "stack",   radius = 0.2,   ...,   binwidth = NULL,   bins = NULL,   center = NULL,   boundary = NULL,   closed = c("right", "left"),   pad = FALSE,   breaks = NULL,   drop = "none",   orientation = NA,   na.rm = FALSE,   show.legend = NA,   inherit.aes = TRUE )

title: Histogram with rounded bars — geom_histogram_rounded
text: mapping Set aesthetic mappings created ggplot2::aes(). specified inherit.aes = TRUE (default), combined default mapping top level plot. must supply mapping plot mapping. data data displayed layer. three options: NULL, default, data inherited plot data specified call ggplot2::ggplot(). data.frame, object, override plot data. objects fortified produce data frame. See ggplot2::fortify() variables created. function called single argument, plot data. return value must data.frame, used layer data. function can created formula (e.g. ~ head(.x, 10)). position Position adjustment, either string naming adjustment (e.g. "jitter" use position_jitter), result call position adjustment function. Use latter need change settings adjustment. radius normalized rounding amount 0 1. Use 0 square corners 1 maximum rounding bar can safely support. ... arguments passed ggplot2::layer(). often aesthetics, used set aesthetic fixed value, like colour = "red" size = 3. may also parameters paired geom/stat. binwidth width bins. default uses 30 bins cover range data. usually override value, exploring multiple widths find best illustrate stories data. bins Number bins. Overridden binwidth. Defaults 30. center, boundary Bin position specifiers passed ggplot2::stat_bin(). closed One "right" "left" indicating whether right left edges bins included. pad TRUE, adds empty bins either side range. breaks numeric vector bin boundaries. drop Controls whether empty bins dropped. Passed ggplot2::stat_bin(). orientation orientation layer. Passed ggplot2::stat_bin(). na.rm FALSE, default, missing values removed warning. TRUE, missing values silently removed. show.legend logical. layer included legends? NA, default, includes aesthetics mapped. FALSE never includes, TRUE always includes. can also named logical vector finely select aesthetics display. inherit.aes FALSE, overrides default aesthetics, rather combining . useful helper functions define data aesthetics inherit behaviour default plot specification, e.g. ggplot2::borders().

title: Histogram with rounded bars — geom_histogram_rounded
code: library(ggplot2)  ggplot(faithful, aes(waiting)) +   geom_histogram_rounded() #> `stat_bin()` using `bins = 30`. Pick better value `binwidth`.   ggplot(faithful, aes(waiting)) +   geom_histogram_rounded(bins = 10, radius = 1)

title: ggrounded (development version)
text: Horizontal bars now round terminal bar edge correctly geom_col_rounded() geom_bar_rounded(). README examples now include horizontal rounded bar example.

title: ggrounded 0.1.0
text: Breaking change: radius now uses normalized bar-relative values 0 1 instead grid::unit() inputs. Rounded corners now scale bar’s geometry clamp automatically dense bars, short bars, negative bars. geom_histogram_rounded() added rounded histogram bins.

title: ggrounded 0.0.2
text: CRAN release: 2023-05-08 vdiffr moved Imports Suggests.
